name: pdca-skill-creator
description: Create PDCA-based Codex skills with mandatory whole-table confirmation, crawler scope and field-mapping probes, automation-boundary analysis, quality gates, and clean packaging.

interface.longDescription: Create Codex skills that follow a PDCA loop with Plan, Do, Check, and Act stages while preserving the business core first. Work is isolated into four periods: creator evolution, business-skill generation, runtime and checking, and evidence-based review. Before a business skill can be generated, users must confirm one complete requirements table. Crawler requests additionally confirm collection scope, pagination, detail-page behavior, and a probe-based page-to-output field mapping. Every workflow classifies actions as script-fixed, AI decision points, or user confirmation, with deterministic automation preferred. The creator also requires Do-script plans, install verification, configurable Python entrypoints, sample-based crawler checks, network diagnostics, maturity grading, contract-consistent checks, and clean plugin directories.
defaultPrompt: Use $pdca-skill-creator to create a skill for a recurring workflow.
Use $pdca-skill-creator to upgrade an existing workflow skill.
Use $pdca-skill-creator to design a self-checking inspection skill.
Use $pdca-skill-creator to run iterative creator use case tests and improve the creator rules.
